meaning: n.(印度大麻花头制成的)大麻脂
examples: So is Charas a naive dreamer?
Aspiration, Charas believes, is the key to Mozambique's reinvention.
The @ symbol in Jornal @Verdade is Charas' benchmark for success: when Mozambicans are digitally literate enough to recognize the symbol as part of an e-mail address, he will have done his job.
"Enron executives were meeting their goals, but they were the wrong goals, " Charas says.
